programme.title: Meet Me in New York

programme.title: The Moon is in Aquarius
programme.desc: On a starry night lit by an Aquarius full moon, Devante and Liz collide at a house party in San Francisco. The spark is instant-and impossible to ignore. Ditching the crowd, they embark on a spontaneous journey through the city's winding streets, iconic views, and hidden gems. With every laugh and shared secret, their bond deepens. But is this love story bound by time-do they only have until dawn?

programme.title: The Challenger
programme.desc: The Challenger follows the life struggles of a young, Bronx auto mechanic, Jaden Miller. When Jaden and his mother are evicted from their home, he soon finds that boxing may be the key to stop them from living on the streets and the ticket to a better life. With legendary trainer, Duane Taylor, Miller becomes a local hero and captures the attention of a cable network that decides to create a reality show around his goal to fight to the Light-Heavyweight Title.

programme.title: Falcon Rising
programme.desc: Chapman is an ex-marine in Brazil's slums, battling the yakuza outfit who attacked his sister and left her for dead.

programme.title: I'm In Love With A Church Girl

programme.title: Redemption
programme.desc: Lost and grieving, Chris seeks solace in the wrong crowd. A chance encounter with the enigmatic Patrick leads him down a dangerous path, forcing him to confront his own morality and the consequences of his choices.

programme.title: Weapons of Warfare
programme.desc: When 19 year old TJ, decides to leave the nest of his parents who are preachers of the gospel and turns to the streets for the love and support he always wanted. His life is turned upside down almost over night with gun violence, drug dealings, stolen money and countless crimes in the blink of an eye. His life becomes a tug of war between the parents that raised him and his new gang leader chief Who’s bringing him further down to the ground.

programme.title: Redemption For Easter
programme.desc: The Wright family decides to come together for the Easter holiday weekend after suffering during a tragic event; however, past turmoil, individual trauma, dark family secrets, and a sudden surprise announcement will potentially change everything for them as a whole, but it could also destroy their family unit forever.

programme.title: Tainted Waters
programme.desc: An unknowingly selfish mechanic, unable to financially save his failing business, agrees to take part in a four man robbery. Now hiding out from the cops, he has to make it through the night in a room of people where he's not the most selfish.

programme.title: 2025 Armageddon
programme.desc: Aliens attack Earth using the gigantic creatures and disasters found on a B-movie TV Channel.

programme.title: 24 Hours to D-Day

programme.title: Halloween Night
programme.desc: Based on a true story, a man breaks free from an asylum on Halloween night and slaughters more victims.

programme.title: 666: The Child
programme.desc: After a couple adopts a child, people near them suffer torturous deaths. The boy is the son of Satan.

programme.title: Legion of the Dead
programme.desc: Mummified remains of an evil Egyptian queen brought back to life resurrects an army of living dead.

programme.title: Dracula's Curse
programme.desc: A team of vampire hunters set out to battle an evil vampire clan in the dark underworld.

programme.title: Bloody Bites
programme.desc: Streaming exclusively from Bloody Disgusting and Scotchworthy Productions, Bloody Bites is a compilation of snack-sized horror films that will terrorize, astonish, disturb, and excite genre fans across the globe.

programme.title: Bloody Bites
programme.desc: An easy job turns into a struggle for survival for a HVAC repair man. Stuck to the roof, he must escape before night falls and the real horror begins.

programme.title: Pennywise: The Story of IT
programme.desc: This in-depth look at the 1990 mini-series based on Stephen King's iconic novel features interviews with many of the cult classic's key players, including director Tommy Lee Wallace and cast members Seth Green, Richard Thomas, and Tim Curry, who portrayed the notorious monster clown, Pennywise.

programme.title: Hatchet III
programme.desc: In the epic third installment of Adam Greens slasher franchise, Marybeth (Danielle Harris, Halloween) uncovers the true secret to stopping the voodoo curse that has left the ghost of deformed maniac Victor Crowley (Kane Hodder, Friday the 13th) stalking the New Orleans bayou for decades. An entire police department, paramedic response team, and heavily armed S.W.A.T. unit face off with the iconic monster in this action-packed and explosive horror comedy. Hatchet III is full of stunts and jaw dropping gore effects that raise both the bar and the body count of the previous two films put together. Also starring genre favorites Zach Galligan (Gremlins), Caroline Williams (Texas Chainsaw Massacre 2), and Derek Mears (Friday the 13th 2009 and Predators).

programme.title: The Loch Ness Monster
programme.desc: In the arena of cryptozoology, few creatures have captured the imagination like the Loch Ness Monster. Sightings and stories of this beast of lore go back decades. Also known as Nessie for short, this creature is said to occupy Loch Ness in the Scottish Highlands and is often described as massive and long-necked. Widespread interest and belief in the Monster have increased significantly since it was brought to worldwide attention in 1933. Evidence of its presence is anecdotal, with several disputed photos and sonar examinations, but does the Loch Ness Monster really exist? Follow us as we deep dive into the facts.

programme.title: The House By the Cemetery
programme.desc: A young family moves from their cramped New York City apartment to a spacious new home in New England. But this is no ordinary house in the country: the previous owner was the deranged Dr. Freudstein, whose monstrous human experiments have left a legacy of bloody mayhem. Now, someone - or something - is alive in the basement, and home sweet home is about to become a horrific hell on earth.

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: A drain clog turns out to be more than just a little matted hair and soap scum. Then, scientists fight to contain the creature they've been studying - but is the true threat one of them?

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: Simon has invented an incredible virtual reality experience that allows him to join in on his favorite films ... but what happens when the virtual reality becomes Simon's actual reality?

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: After the death of a loved one, a drinking habit becomes insatiable. Then, dolls are Evie's favorite companions, but when a severed toy head appears in her dollhouse, Evie can no longer protect them.

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: A platoon of American soldiers finds something more sinister than war behind enemy lines. Then, a man with a passion for found objects finds something particularly odd: a finger ... and it's growing.

programme.title: Party Hard, Die Young
programme.desc: A graduation getaway is grounds for a slasher in this slick teen scream.

programme.desc: A traveler is hunted by locals after his car breaks down in a mysterious area. A SHUDDER EXCLUSIVE

programme.title: Last Ones Out
programme.desc: Waking from surgery, Henry finds himself alone, in the dark, and in a hospital that has been overrun by a horde of flesh-hungry zombies. Together with the last few survivors, Henry must find a path to safety.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Great Feud" - Granny and the rest of the Clampetts start a feud with the Drysdales since Sonny courted Elly May and then stood her up when granny suggested marriage.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Elly Races Jetherine" - When Sonny Drysdale promises to give Elly May a ring, Granny thinks he's going to propose and becomes a matchmaker. Cousin Pearl can't stand the idea that Elly May will get married before Jethrine, so she sets to matchmaking Jethrine with Jasper Depew.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Pygmalion and Elly" - Sonny Drysdale decides he needs to be Pygmalion to Elly's Galatea and remake her from a hillbilly into a woman of society, while Granny uses love charms to heat up their relationship.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Elly's First Date" - Mr. Drysdale convinces his self-absorbed stepson Sonny to date Elly May to Mrs. Drysdale's consternation, while Granny and Jed make preparations for Thanksgiving.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jethro Goes to School" - Jed enrolls Jethro at an exclusive Beverly Hills elementary school. Millicent Schuyler-Potts, the proprietor of the school, is aghast when Jed and Jethro show up, convinced this is part of some ghastly hoax. After Jed says that banker Milburn Drysdale is his neighbor, she calls the banker. It turns out that Drysdale's bank holds the mortgage on the school. Schulyer-Potts suddenly warms to the charms of the Clampetts, even if it means accepting Jethro as a fifth grader.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Servants" - Ellie May starts wearing dresses but takes it as an insult when someone says she looks like a city girl. Mr. Drysdale talks Jed into taking in his butler and upstairs girl in a plan to civilize the Clampetts, but they don't quite understand the idea of servants. Miss Hathaway takes Jethro bowling and begins to show an interest in him.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Trick or Treat" - Granny wants to go home because "folks is so unfriendly, no one has come to call." Jed convinces her that they should call on them, and they find that people welcome them and give them all manner of gifts when they show up on Halloween in their normal hillbilly clothes. Also, Jed works on getting Pearl to come visit while she's trying to get hitched to the oilman and find a young man for Jethrine.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Elly Needs a Maw" - Mr. Drysdale needs investors for his real estate development project, so he enlists the Widow Fenwick, and aims to cement the deal by hitching her to Jed Clampett, who is looking to find a mother for his daughter, Elly May.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Elly Starts to School" - Mrs. Drysdale recommends Elly for a high-brow finishing school in hopes that humiliating her will drive the Clampetts away; but instead Miss Hathaway convinces the girls at the school that Elly is a fashion trend-setter. Elly invites the filthy rich Fenwicks over, thinking they're destitute.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When Miss Hathaway gets sick and Mr. Drysdale has to speak at a conference, Jed helps out by running the bank and having Elly be his secretary, while Jethro finds a speech that Drysdale accidentally uses instead of his own. All the while a new teller sucks-up to the men and flirts with the women.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Elly's Animals" - When Pearl starts selling music lessons, Mrs. Drysdale complains about the noise to the police. Mrs. Drysdale also calls the dog catcher on Duke.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Elly Races Jetherine" - When Sonny Drysdale promises to give Elly May a ring, Granny thinks he's going to propose and becomes a matchmaker. Cousin Pearl can't stand the idea that Elly May will get married before Jethrine, so she sets to matchmaking Jethrine with Jasper Depew.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Pygmalion and Elly" - Sonny Drysdale decides he needs to be Pygmalion to Elly's Galatea and remake her from a hillbilly into a woman of society, while Granny uses love charms to heat up their relationship.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Elly's First Date" - Mr. Drysdale convinces his self-absorbed stepson Sonny to date Elly May to Mrs. Drysdale's consternation, while Granny and Jed make preparations for Thanksgiving.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jethro's First Love" - Jethro decides that he wants to go a-courtin', so after Uncle Jed gives him a little education, he finds himself a woman--who happens to be a stripper. As usual, neither she or the Clampetts actually understand what the other is really saying.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Corey Hazlett insists he's innocent of murder, despite Lucas's eyewitness testimony.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Abe Lincoln's claim that he's the Great Emancipator amuses everyone except Matt Yordy.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Stubborn Grandpa Fogarty is Lucas's main roadblock as he tries to get young Woody Fogarty to attend school.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark Twain visits North Fork and quickly alienates the townspeople.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas tries to stop embittered John Holliver from venting his wrath on the people who expelled him from town years before.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark is kidnapped and held for ransom, he finds himself an unwilling companion of gunman Carl Avery.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas seeks an escape when he's captured by outlaws while seeking help for an injured Mark.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The young Queen-to-be of France hides out in North Fork with her sick brother.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A notorious killer is being held in the North Fork jail. When word gets around that Gordo's gang is on its way to free him, the whole town becomes frightened.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas's old Army pal settles in North Fork with his deaf daughter.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark falls head-over-heels in puppy love.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Banker Hamilton is closing up for the day when Rudy Gray persuades him to stay open for one more transaction.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Tip Corey, the son of a man allegedly murdered in North Fork, has a killer's reputation and comes to town to kill Micah.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Len Richards and his brother, Ab, confront a Lucas McCain look-alike, Earl Bantry and his sidekick K.C. Peters, for slaughtering one of Richards' steers.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark and Milly are shocked when Lucas begins gambling. They don't know that Lucas is "undercover" trying to catch a man cheating.

programme.title: 3:10 To Yuma
programme.desc: A poor rancher endangers his life when he escorts an outlaw to trial in one of the best 1950s classic Westerns.

programme.title: Mackenna's Gold
programme.desc: A US Marshal is forced to lead a gang of bandits to a hidden valley of gold.

programme.title: They Rode West
programme.desc: An idealistic Army doctor faces the hostility of his own men when he helps the malaria-stricken Kiowa tribe.

programme.title: Ride Lonesome
programme.desc: A bounty hunter uses a young outlaw to lure his older brother into a trap.

programme.title: Buck And The Preacher
programme.desc: A wagon master and a con-man preacher help freed slaves dogged by cheap-labor agents out West.

programme.title: The Kansan
programme.desc: Richard Dix stars in this epic of the boisterous and brawling Old West! Wounded in a gun battle with the notorious James gang, John Bonniwell (Dix) wakes up in the hospital to find out hes been elected marshal! He quickly learns that this hot-headed frontier town can only be cooled off with blazing lead and dynamite! Jane Wyatt, Albert Dekker, Victor Jory, and Robert Armstrong also star in this tale of smashing fists and crashing bullets from director George Archainbaud (The Lost Squadron).

programme.title: Painted Desert
programme.desc: A mightly melodrama of red-blooded action, William Boyd stars in the Pre-Code western talkie - The Painted Desert (1931). The first sound film for Hollywood heavyweight Clark Gable, The Painted Desert finds Boyd and Gable at odds over the affections of a cowboy's beautiful daughter (Helen Twelvetrees).

programme.title: American Empire
programme.desc: This epic of America's westward march stars Leo Carrillo and Preston Foster in a tale of men building a cattle empire, only to battle rustlers, the weather, and each other! The romantic adventure from director William C. McGann (In Old California, Alcatraz Island) features a strong leading performance by Oscar nominated RKO star Richard Dix (Cimarron, The Ghost Ship) plus cinematography by six-time Oscar nominee Russell Harlan (To Kill a Mockingbird, Rio Bravo).

programme.title: The Gunman from Bodie
programme.desc: The Rough Riders, a popular group that thrilled audiences in the early 1940s, are after a gang of rustlers in this B-western from Hollywood's Poverty Row. Starring Buck Jones, Tim McCoy, and Raymond Hatton, this movie features everything from lawmen going undercover to the Rough Riders looking after an orphaned baby! Also, be on the lookout for the beautiful Christine McIntyre, who would go on to appear in several of the Three Stooges shorts for Colombia Pictures.

programme.title: Fighting Fury
programme.desc: A THRILLING TALE OF REVENGE AND REDEMPTION! Based on the story Triple Cross for Danger by the widely lauded Western author Walter J. Coburn, Fighting Fury is a thrilling take on the Western revenge drama. Portraying both a father and his son, star of silent and sound cowboy adventure films, Jack Hoxie (Trouble Busters, Law and Lawless) exudes the classic American rustic charm that still defines the genre. The film spins the yarn of Clay Hill Jr. (Hoxie), a Spanish-American boy raised by a Mexican servant who vows bloody vengeance on three malicious ranchers after they murder his parents and turn his life upside down. Featuring fine supporting performances from genre heavies Helen Holmes, Buck Conners and Western mainstay Fred Kohler.

programme.title: Diamond Trail
programme.desc: Diamond Trail is an epic that starts in the speeding taxicabs and illegal barrooms of the east coast, and travels west for its exciting climax. Reporter Speed Morgan (Rex Bell), going undercover as Frisco Eddy, infiltrates Flash Barrett's gang in order to bring them all to justice. But can he get the job done before they learn his identity? With a cast that includes Frances Rich and Bud Osborne, this action tale from director Harry L. Fraser (The Last of the Clintons) is another forgotten classic from Monogram Pictures.

programme.title: With Sitting Bull at the Spirit Lake Massacre
programme.desc: A long-thought-lost film finally surfaces after being unseen for over eight decades. Created and copyrighted by Sunset Productions in 1925 but not released until June 15, 1927, this silent epic features the superior Native American actor Chief Yowlachie (performing here under the name Chief Yowlache) as Sitting Bull. Other fine actors in the cast include the always popular Bryant Washburn and a young Bob Steele, who appears under his real name Bob Bradbury Jr. The story takes place in the 1860s or 1870s near Spirit Lake, Iowa. Settlements of whites are growing in that region but the Sioux Indians also have professed their interest in one such settlement. Chief Sitting Bull surveys the settlement at Spirit Lake from afar and with the advice of the Great Spirit vows to retake the land that belonged to his fathers.

programme.title: The Ballad Of Lefty Brown
programme.desc: A merciless cowboy sets out on a dangerous journey across the frontier, determined to do whatever it takes to avenge his longtime partner's brutal murder in this thrilling, action-packed western.

programme.title: Broken Arrow
programme.desc: For a decade, the white settlers and the Apaches have been engaged in a bloody war with no peaceful end in sight. When a white scout, Tom Jeffords (James Stewart), has a dangerously close but enlightening encounter with the natives, he begins to see the humanity in these enemies. Entering the Apache territory seeking peace, Jeffords forms a friendship with the Apache leader Cochise (Jeff Chandler), although there are people on both sides who resist extending the olive branch.

programme.title: Buckskin
programme.desc: Set in 1820, a Texan fur trapper journeys into the mysterious Buckskin woods in the hopes of saving a lost boy.

programme.title: Jesse James
programme.desc: Jesse James and his brother Frank race to secure the family's buried gold as members of the James-Younger gang attempt to steal it.

programme.title: Doc Holliday
programme.desc: Doc Holliday runs a small dental practice in rural Georgia when he is visited by Wyatt Earp and offered a chance to become a United States Deputy. All Doc has to do is capture the Bridle Brothers - two of most notorious outlaws the West has ever seen. The Doc sets out on an adventure like none other to find these hardened criminals and ends up forging a friendship with Wyatt Earp that would carry into the events of Tombstone.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Faced with the pressure of passing Grade 7 on his second time around and his mother's newest threat to take him back to his unhappy life up north, Sean is beginning to slip into old, angry patterns.

programme.title: Red Green - On Tour
programme.desc: If you've ever wanted to see me live (or see if I was still alive), I'm doing a brand new one-man show....and this could be it. In fact, I'm calling the tour - This Could Be It. It's a 90 minute family-friendly lodge meeting and I invite you to join in.

programme.title: Wide World of Cooking
programme.desc: There are breakfast burritos, and then there’s Macheen’s breakfast burrito — a tortilla wrapped around the imagination of chef Jonathan Pérez and his sister, Ana. Birria and swiss, longanisa, and crispy pork belly breakfast burritos are the true stars at Macheen. In this episode, they show us how their spin on the classics has turned into one of Smorgasburg’s most talked-about stalls.

programme.title: Wide World of Cooking
programme.desc: Dominic Cagliero didn’t set out to be a pitmaster. He was an Army vet who fell in love with barbecue the long, hard way: hours tending a fire, obsessing over smoke, figuring out how to make brisket bend without breaking. Full Send is the result — a Filipino-Texan fusion BBQ stall at Smorgasburg LA where the energy feels less like a business and more like a backyard party.

programme.title: Wide World of Cooking
programme.desc: At Lobsterdamus, family is everything. The Reyes family set out to change the way LA thinks about lobster — not boiled but split in half, grilled over mesquite, and dripping with butter. What started as a family vision has become one of Smorgasburg’s signature stalls, proving lobster doesn’t need fine dining to feel unforgettable.

programme.title: Wide World of Cooking
programme.desc: Chef Yazeed “Yaz” Soudani’s Jordanian-style shawarma popped out of a backyard and turned Smorgasburg LA into his laboratory. Think juicy chicken marinated in spices from Amman, fresh saj bread, beef-tallow-fried fries, and a “Yaz way” that’s equal parts garlic kick + pomegranate molasses. Chef Yaz takes us through his journey to Smorgasburg and shares what's next.

programme.title: Wide World of Cooking
programme.desc: Darwin Wai’s Thai-inspired gelato business flips the script on dessert. Instead of sugar cones and sprinkles, he’s serving bold flavors like Thai basil, cold brew Thai tea, and strawberry-balsamic, sometimes scooped right on top of coconut sticky rice. At Smorgasburg LA, Moom Maam has become the stall that keeps diners cool, curious, and always coming back to see what unexpected flavor Darwin will churn out next.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Show
programme.desc: Dave made a special gumbo recipe for a guest...but got a different guest than he bargained for, and one he knows very well. He and his new guest talk off-the-cuff about the differences between jambalaya and gumbo, how New Orleans has the most distinct food culture in any US city, and debate which city best represents the food of the South, all while acknowledging a lack of expertise. They finish with a quick Atlas of where to eat in New Orleans.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Show
programme.desc: Dave makes an incredibly unlikely dish for him to make: a casserole. Dave has Oscar and Emmy-winning writer/director Cord Jefferson as his guest and makes chicken divan to try to bring him back to his childhood. The duo talk their recent trip to Las Vegas together, Cord's unusual route to where he is today, and their philosophies on failure and success. They talk about maintaining a worldly curiosity, trying new things, and how learning what you don't like can be just as important as learning what you do, then finish with a MOIF about Vegas.

programme.title: Recipe Club: The Podcast
programme.desc: Recipe Club: The Podcast - Lemons - Dave and Chris are joined by Rachel Khong to take the lemons life gave them and make a lemon pod. In this episode, the Recipe Club is gifted a delicious ice cream creation from listeners Maggie and Geoffrey Litt, who were so inspired by Season 2’s darling—the Margarita Sangria—that they came up with their “Lemon Darty Ice Cream Party,” which came with not just a recipe, but a companion cocktail (required to be consumed prior to starting) and strict addenda for the cooks to follow.

programme.title: Recipe Club: The Podcast
programme.desc: Recipe Club: The Podcast - Chicken Wings - Chris Ying clucks it up with Bryan Ford and John deBary about all things chicken wings. The guys break down their scale of love (or meh) for the ever-popular menu offering, and rate their go-to sauce if they were forced to choose only one. They then go through their cooking experience with this episode’s delicious braised chicken wing recipe.

programme.title: Recipe Club: The Podcast
programme.desc: Recipe Club: The Podcast - Flavored Vodka - Chris is joined by guests Rachel Khong and Priya Krishna to dabble in the dark arts of flavored vodka. The Recipe Club isn’t afraid of the oft-mocked genre of spirit, but rather embraces it in the name of home cookery.

programme.title: Billy & Dom Eat The World
programme.desc: Billy and Dom explore Kyushu, the most southerly of the Japanese main islands. They master the art of making the world famous Tonkotsu Ramen, fashion their own sushi knives with the help of a blacksmith who ordinarily has an eight-year waiting list for his product, and participate in a traditional Japanese tea ceremony.

programme.title: Billy & Dom Eat The World
programme.desc: Billy and Dom head to Dom’s hometown of Manchester, the world’s first industrialised city and now a vibrant food capital. They brunch at cult diner Gooey, learn to cook curry at a classic “Rice & Three” café, explore the science behind ice cream cones, and enjoy a special tour of Manchester United’s iconic stadium.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Wagyu Demystified: Wagyu, “Japanese cow” literally, was once an obscure cattle breed from Japan. Today, it’s on restaurant menus and in butcher shops around the world. Get ready for a sumptuous Japanese A5 Rib-Eye with sesame salt and grilled rice cakes, followed by wagyu steak tomahawks with fire-roasted marrow. Then feast your eyes on wagyu smash burgers with parmesan crisps.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Influential Grilling: Scroll through the images on Instagram, Facebook, and TikTok, and you’ll find grilled and smoked dishes of astonishing ingenuity. In the spirit of this new style of barbecue, we’ve invited three of my favorite influencers to grill with me – Derek Wolf from Over the Fire Cooking, Scott Thomas from Grillin’ Fools, and Susie Bulloch from Hey Grill Hey.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Rolled, Stuffed and Grilled: Ever since humankind first put food to fire, the world’s grill cultures have wrapped and rolled flavorful ingredients. Steven explores two South American grilled classics—a stuffed chicken breast from Uruguay called pamplona, and a colorful stuffed beef roll Argentineans know as matambre. Plus, a Project Fire Mystery Box recipe that may involve a crustacean.”

programme.title: Exploring Europe's Great Food Markets
programme.desc: The CentralTirgus is the biggest covered city food market in Europe. Just aside the Art Nouveau Old Town, we find century-old rye-bread making, grilled lampreys, soviet milk sausages, and hemp butter. Here the best of Latvian traditions are pushed fast-forward into the digital era by young and curious chefs, bloggers, and pop-up restaurants.

programme.title: Exploring Europe's Great Food Markets
programme.desc: The old ladies selling their baskets full of vegetables and cheese on the Dolac market in Zagreb bring us back in time. At the market, we go from the breathtaking Mediterranean islands to the Austrian Alps, from freshly caught hake and simple Baltic snacks to internationally awarded cheese and a unique Turkey breed.

programme.title: Exploring Europe's Great Food Markets
programme.desc: At the Mercato Centrale in San Lorenzo, one can taste the best food treasures Tuscany has on offer: from the olive oil of the Fiesole hills to the onions of the medieval borough of Certaldo and up to the Natural Reserve of San Marcello with its Tuscan cured meats. Here the simple and genuine tastes are king.

programme.title: Exploring Europe's Great Food Markets
programme.desc: A natural haven of tasty delights and local delicacies, the Croix Rousse is Lyon's market gem. From goat farms where the region's most delicious cheeses are contrived to bakeries that produce only organic bread. This episode comes with a warning, be prepared to get very hungry indeed!

programme.desc: Before tackling a project in your yard, be sure to plan carefully. programme.title: Wild Life
programme.desc: At the edge of the Old World there is a peninsula connecting Europe and Africa. With warm sheltering tropics in its southern regions and a mountainous north of wet and old forests, the Iberian Peninsula contains mystery and diversity.

programme.title: The Green Wave
programme.desc: The land of Egypt contains unique natural and historical wonders. In the Red Sea, meet with freediving world champion Davide Carrera, then travel along the Nile River and experience the thrill of standup paddleboarding from Aswan to Luxor.

programme.title: The Green Wave
programme.desc: The Kwai is among the last sail-powered cargo ships on Earth. It is the only link between the Line Islands in the Pacific Ocean and the rest of the world. On Fanning Island, there is no water or electricity, and sustainability is Job #1.

programme.title: Under the Pole
programme.desc: Dive into the frigid waters of the Arctic Ocean to discover an awe-inspiring universe under the ice. Spend two months trekking over ice floes by foot, and plunge beneath the icy waters of the North Pole. This unique documentary is precise testimony of what is at risk to our world's ice caps.

programme.title: Inside America's National Parks
programme.desc: Experience the supreme and sacred spectacle of the Grand Canyon. This insider's view of one of the world's greatest natural wonders takes you rim-to-rim to hike hidden canyons, plunge into ancient pools, raft world-class rapids, discover manmade gems, and explore extreme backcountry.

programme.title: Green Paradise
programme.desc: Chilean Patagonia is an exceptional part of the world. The immense beauty and grandeur of this land will burn everlasting images and memories into your mind. Located within this extraordinary mountain range exist two granite towers overlooking the Patagonian plain amid flourishing waters.

programme.title: Green Paradise
programme.desc: The sands of the Moroccan Desert rhythmically dance across a vast, ethereal landscape. This immense region of parched sand and rock appears frozen for eternity, but it is not, as the dunes of the desert are ever being carefully shaped and transformed by the capricious winds of time.

programme.title: Once Upon a Texas Train
programme.desc: Outlaw John Henry Lee (Willie Nelson) and his gang are bank robbers tearing through Texas. When their next heist is on a train, Lee's freedom comes to an end when Capt. Owen Hayes (Richard Widmark) of the Texas Rangers catches the thief red-handed. Released after 20 years, Lee wastes no time picking up where he left off -- which pushes Hayes to come out of retirement to catch his man again. But Hayes is not the only one after Lee when a young bandit (Shaun Cassidy) targets the old crook.

programme.title: The Gun and the Pulpit
programme.desc: After narrowly escaping a lynch mob, atheist gunslinger Ernie Parsons (Marjoe Gortner) steals the identity of a murdered preacher and takes his job in a western town. Ernie falls for the beautiful Sally Underwood (Pamela Sue Martin) and becomes attached to the town he's come to think of as his sanctuary. So when his new home is threatened by a tyrannical land baron, Ernie must use both his extensive skills as a gunfighter and his minimal skills as a preacher to defend the townspeople.

After a domestic dispute results in the death of both of her parents, Pearl moves in with her aunt, Laura Belle (Lillian Gish), on an expansive farm. When Pearl notices Laura Belle's son, the fiery Lewt, life on the ranch erupts into chaos. The two have a brief courtship, but Lewt abruptly ends the relationship. When Pearl tries to move on, Lewt's jealousy leads to a climactic gun battle between the former lovers.

programme.title: Mohawk
programme.desc: In the 18th century, American artist Jonathan Adams (Scott Brady) was working in Mohawk territory, where he paints the local scenery. Before long, he meets and falls in love with Native American woman Oneida (Rita Gam), but the couple's happiness is interrupted when land tycoon Butler (John Hoyt) deviously pits incoming white settlers against the Mohawk people. Jonathan and his lover are caught in the middle of a violent feud, and the natives become suspicious of the American living among them.

programme.title: Jail

programme.desc: An inmate is subdued for refusing to follow commands. A woman accused of running out on a dinner bill has her jewelry sawed off in jail. After issuing criminal terrorist threats, a man is jailed.

programme.desc: A woman gives officers a hard time in booking when she refuses to comply. A catwoman is arrested for hitting her date at a club, and a pusherman discusses his contributions to the economy.

programme.desc: A night of karaoke results in a domestic-violence charge, and a drunk inmate starts a fight with his cellmate.

programme.desc: An aspiring martial-arts fighter tries to wriggle out of handcuffs and gets stuck. A football rivalry takes a bad turn when a Steelers fan assaults a Ravens fan.

programme.title: Let's Count To 100 - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: We are learning to count to 100 with Finny the Shark! This is a perfect numbers song for young kids and preschoolers! Let’s count to 100. Counting’s so much fun. Let’s count to 100. We’ll start from number 1.

programme.title: Seven Steps - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Counting to seven has never been more memorable and fun! Learn numbers with this simple counting song.

programme.title: Goodbye A, Goodbye Z - Super Simple ABCs and more
programme.desc: We're saying, "Goodbye" to all of our friends in Alphabet Village. As the school day ends, take a walk through town, and bid farewell to all of the letters.

programme.title: I Like To Ride My Bicycle (Mr. Monkey) - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Let's go on a bike ride with Mr. Monkey and friends as we sing along to this Mr. Monkey version of the original Super Simple Song, "I Like To Ride My Bicycle." This is a great song to introduce during transportation themes! I like to ride my bicycle. I ride it every day. I ride it when I go to school. Or when I want to play.

programme.title: What's Your Name? - Kids Song - Finny the Shark and more
programme.desc: Finny the Shark is saying "Hello" and asking the question "What's your name?" This is a fun song to start the day at preschool! Hello, hello. What’s your name? Hello, hello. What’s your name? My name is Finny! My name is Myrtle! Nice to meet you.

programme.title: Wind The Bobbin Up - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: “Wind the bobbin up. Wind the bobbin up. Pull, pull, clap, clap, clap.” Get up and dance with this super fun version of the traditional English nursery rhyme.

programme.title: Hot Cross Buns - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Here’s one of our favorite traditional nursery rhymes about food, made super simple. Come sing along with the Chef from our “Do You Know The Muffin Man?” and “Pat-A-Cake” videos. Yum yum!

programme.title: Flying Dragon Fruit Cake - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Come forth brave warriors and watch the Bumble Nums catch some Flying Dragon Fruits for their fiery Flying Dragon Fruit Cake! But be careful! They breathe fire and are very fast!

programme.title: Carl's Big Adventure - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Carl is visited by three large, very dirty construction vehicles. But Carl’s Car Wash is not big enough to fit them! Carl has an idea! He can supersize his car wash so the vehicles can get a proper scrub-a-dub-dub. He just needs a few parts. With the help of old friends, Carl sets out on a big adventure to the darkest depths of the ocean, the highest heights in the land, and beyond! Don't miss Carl in his first mini-movie as he pushes himself to the limit in the name of vehicular cleanliness!

programme.title: Finny's First Day Of School - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Finny is a bit nervous on the first day of school, but Myrtle the Turtle is even more anxious and literally hides her shell! Surely Myrtle will come out of her shell when their teacher, a whale named Mr. Magellan, has them draw and present their favorite things to the class! Nope. Myrtle is even more nervous than ever! Being a good friend, Finny helps Myrtle through her anxiety, and the tiny turtle finally shows her drawing to everyone.

programme.title: 10 Little Dinosaurs - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: 10 Stegosauruses! 10 Triceratopses! 10 Pterodactyls! 10 Brontosauruses! And 10 Tyrannosaurus Rex! Wow! This Super Simple counting song introduces the numbers 1-10 and also some very cool dinosaur names! Can you say them all?!

programme.title: Mr. Golden Sun - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Mister Sun, Sun, Mr. Golden Sun...please shine down on me! It’s the Mr. Sun song from Super Simple Songs!

programme.title: Baby Shark & More Kids Songs - Super Simple Songs
programme.desc: 20 fun Super Simple Songs with Baby Shark, Five Little Ducks, Mr. Golden Sun, Ice Cream Song, and more!

programme.title: Driving In My Car - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Drive a car, ride a bike, row a boat, ride on a train, and fly an airplane with this playful and super fun song for kids; “Driving In My Car”! Driving in my car. Vroom vroom vroom. Driving very fast. Vroom vroom vroom. Driving very slow. Vroom vroom vroom. I like driving. Driving in my car.

programme.title: See You Later Alligator - Super Simple Puppets - Kids Songs - Super Simple
programme.desc: It’s time to go! Here’s a video featuring the Super Simple Puppets for our popular goodbye song, See You Later, Alligator. This is a fun song to sing at the end of a class, party, or play-date!

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett and Marty help wash Maxy the giant plane and calm geysers at Oyunuma Pond, then deliver a Wright Flyer to Braden, sparking a time-hop to the Wright brothers, where teamwork lifts spirits and the Flyer takes flight.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett, Lucie, and Runi’s friendly contest becomes teamwork when they rescue toys from a Vietnam factory fire. Soon, Jett races to Dino World, freeing stranded friends and reuniting a T-Rex family as quakes rumble. Super Wings deliver!

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Noah and the Dino Wings turn hail into fruit seeds, planting a thriving farm with Jett’s help and saving Dino World from a flood. Later, teamwork and a daring rescue inside Supersaurus bring the friends closer as everyone returns home safe.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: In Sicily, Jett and Curie foil invisibility pranks and stop a wild volcano eruption with Curie’s snow launcher, teaching Renata as chaos turns to learning. Aboard Ned’s ship, Super Electric Suits help them rescue everyone from a junk robot.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: While the World Spaceport celebrates Jimbo’s retirement, Jett faces a UFO and Space Monster, piloting World Robot as chaos erupts. The team unites, time freezes, and Jimbo reveals Megamon is an old friend, choosing to stay with everyone.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett and the Super Wings liven up Xiang Xiang’s Tanghulu shop, rescuing everyone from a syrupy mess and drawing big crowds. In Dino World, the Dino Wings halt a Dinobase takeover and reunite a wandering pterosaur hatchling with its mom.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Floods and thunder strike Dino World but Trico overcomes his fear to help Jett and the Dino Wings rescue every dino with paper boats and planes. Later Noah and Mom’s dino costume adventure leads to a mix-up with real maiasauras, and families reunite.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: In Paris, Jett and Curie shrink to save moles from a burst pipe during a wild croquet chase. Later, Jett and Sara help Princess Maribel when magical dress chaos erupts, restoring order so the party sparkles brighter than ever.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: On the moon, Jett and Curie outsmart dust storms and shield a spacecraft to help Kajsa ride her new bike. In Mexico’s Baja Desert, Jett and Marty clear boulders so Big Wheel can race again and roll to victory, powered by Super Wings spirit.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: In Munich, Jett and Marty foil Golden Boy and Girl’s wolf costume prank during Mila’s parade, saving everyone from a river dunk. Later in Singapore, Jett, Traver, and Lien’s robot dogs safely stop runaway giant fireworks, rescuing the festival.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: In Copenhagen, dinos escape through portals as Jett, Lucie, and Super Wings rescue a brachiosaur and guide everyone home. Across the globe, megabot Super Wings unite to send dinos back through swirling portals, saving the world together.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: At a deep-sea base, Super Wings and ocean pals unite to hoist a damaged base after a belt tug-of-war. In Madagascar, Eddie uses comic-book courage to find an elephant bird feather and save his dad in a thrilling cliffside rescue.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett and Traver inspire Xinyan with Kung Fu mastery, turning chopsticks into her winning move and calming a tiger. In snowy Norway, Jett and Sara stop runaway snowballs so Princess Hedda’s sleigh race ends in victory and laughter.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: On a Bermuda Triangle island, Jett and Runi battle a junk monster and restore the beach for Kyle and his dad. Then in Chiang Mai, the team douses flames, reunites baby elephant Paya with her mom, and celebrates by filming their happy day.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A wedding spins into chaos as a giant ring escapes, but Big Wing’s catch saves the day and unveils a joyful bride. Later, Jett and Golden Boy use Cross Combo power to tame a hungry dino plant and rescue Golden Girl and Runi.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett brings a kite to a boy named Akas in the Himalayas, who wants to fly it in a kite festival. Red Pandas take off with the kite and Jett pursues them. When he runs into trouble and gets pinned under a rock, Dizzy shows up with her rescue gear to save the day.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett goes to Venice, Italy with a mask for Luca to wear at his masquerade party. Jett and Luca set out on a gondola to deliver the invitations, but when they run into a waterway traffic jam, Paul must show up to unclog the canal traffic.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Take your little explorer on an exotic musical expedition to meet wild animals from across the globe. Journey to the jungle, savannah, desert and forest.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As babies grow and change, so does the landscape around them. From fiery red leaves to falling snowflakes; from flowers in bloom to fireworks in July, every season of the year has its own special magic just waiting to be discovered.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Learn about the numbers 1,2,3,4 & 5 through rhyme, real-life footage, counting, stories, and repetition - accompanied by classical music and real world imagery.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Set off on a fun-filled "field trip" with your baby to discover animals found at the park, on the farm, and in your own backyard.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As each day passes, babies' awareness of the world around them -- and all the wonders it holds -- continues to develop. Wild animals are especially intriguing and World Animals captures the spirtit of little ones' fascination with wild creatures as it introduces them to animals living in the jungle, in the ocean, and on the savannah.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As babies grow and change, so does the landscape around them. From fiery red leaves to falling snowflakes; from flowers in bloom to fireworks in July, every season of the year has its own special magic just waiting to be discovered.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As babies develop, their understanding of the world, and how its pieces "fit" together, continues to progress. DISCOVERING SHAPES playfully introduces five basic forms circle, oval, triangle, square and rectangle as each appears in the context of toys, nature and everyday objects.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Ocean Explorers
programme.desc: Cal, Neptune, Opus, Dean, Tinker and others learn about the flora and fauna of the ocean through STEAM-based principles and real-life footage.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Every stage is an exciting adventure with your newborn. As babies grow, they absorb a wide variety of sights and sounds. And with so much to see and hear, infants seem to enjoy, and be most soothed by, gentle sounds such as your voice or pleasant, restful music. Treat your child -- and yourself -- to the delights of Baby Bach Musical Adventure, an award-winning program that exposes babies to the joy and majesty of classical music while presenting them with stimulating, colorful images.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Discover the wonderful world of water and deep dive into all the amazing creatures that call the ocean home. Learn simple words about the sea like water, coral reef, and ocean through narration and repetition. Engaging live-action footage of your favorite ocean friends and classical melodies will dazzle your little explorer as they experience the magical world under the sea.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As little ones grow, their innate sense of wonder grows too, creating an occasion for celebration with each new discovery. Baby Galileo Discovering the Sky introduces them to that remarkable canopy above us: the sun and moon, fluffy clouds, shimmering stars, colorful planets and whirling galaxies.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Your little one will want to keep a beat, snap his fingers and march his feet! Join new characters Pillie, the musical woodpecker, and Coco, the dancing cockatoo, and share the excitement of rhythm with your baby. World of Rhythm explores rhythm in music, rhythm in nature and rhythm as a form of expression.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Meet fascinating creatures from across the globe and learn to run, hop, and crawl like your favorite animal friends. Dance and sing along to discover animal names and the native habitats of the world's most unique creatures. See real-life images of lions and zebras on the African savannah, then learn animal names through repetition and narration, or simply watch your favorite animals play!

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Journey to the classroom with your favorite Baby Einstein friends! Learn about what makes your face incredible, baby's first sounds, and counting in different languages with a focus on Spanish! Real-life engaging imagery, upbeat classical melodies and gentle narration and repetition introduce first words, faces and a variety of different languages to young viewers.

programme.title: No No Song & More Kids Songs
programme.desc: Oh no! The kids want to eat junk food but mummy is not allowing them to eat. Enjoy this No No song where mummy is saying no for everything.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: A speed enhancing fluid deemed Sonic Tonic is created by Robotnik to make him as fast as Sonic so that he may finally catch him.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: The Hedgehogs congregate on the Floating Island in their latest effort to find their mother. But Sleet and Dingo also have an interest in this island.

programme.title: Sonic Underground

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Robotnik has his eyes set upon Queen Aleena's crown jewel, but Sonic, Manic and Sonia plan to retrieve the gem before Robotnik.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Sonic, Manic and Sonia find an abandoned baby in an alley and begin to look for the baby's parents. Manic becomes very fond of the child.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Robotnik announces that he will marry Queen Aleena in a plot to become the king of Mobius.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: A captain of the Queen's guard is captured before he can reach the secret rendezvous where he was to meet Queen Aleena.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: A homecoming is interrupted for Sonic, Sonia and Manic when Sleet and Dingo arrive to collect back taxes after returning to their birthplace.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: The Freedom Fighters run into a Swashbuckler, named Ari, battling Swat-Bots. Sonic diverts them, allowing Ari to escape. After hearing that Robotnik is holding his band of Freedom Fighters hostage, Ari decides to help Sonic free them.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic attempts a solo rescue to prevent prisoners from being roboti-sized and is hit by a Memory Scrambler that erases short-term memory.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: After a disastrous failed mission, Sonic laments that they can't go back and prevent Robotnik's take-over. Dulcy tells them they can and takes Sonic and Sally to the Floating Island where they find the "Time Stones".

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: In Part II, Sonic and Sally steal the Roboti-sizer plans, stop the Destroyer from polluting the Great Forest and save Little Sonic, Little Sally and Dulcy's mother, Sabina.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Antoine decides to study martial arts but after he wrecks most of Knothole Sonic sends him off to practice in the woods. //Tails begins his training to become a real Freedom Fighter by learning tracking skills while on a camping trip.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: After Sonic is almost sucked inside the Void, he finds a huge Ring which Sally believes is an ancient relic but it turns out to be trick of the Sorcerer, Nagus. Sally and Bunnie are drawn inside the Void and when Sonic comes to rescue them.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When a blizzard hits Knothole causing Dulcy to demolish a few huts during a landing, Sonic is forced to bunk with Antoine. // During a rainstorm, Rotor is putting the finishing touches on his new female robot assistant, named Ro-Becca.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: On a mission to contact the first Freedom Fighters on the King's List, Sonic and the others are forced to travel through a tunnel which carries a "curse" against all intruders.

The friends try to glue the broken pieces together but it doesn't work. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a jewelry designer and tries designing jewelry with the broken pieces.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: When Ruby and Choco arrive at the village, they find a very worried looking Ling Ling. Gina, Ellie, and Thunderbell went camping in Rainbow Forest but they saw a monster in the forest, got scared and had to run away. // Ruby is struggling to make a doll with her dad. Ruby and Choco get their suitcase and as Ruby swings her umbrella, there they are, in front of Rainbow fountain. Mayor Ling Ling tells her that today is the day of Princess Kiki's ballet performance.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ruby is looking at shoes that are now too small for her but she is unwilling to throw away. Ling Ling is worried about Thunderbell. His scooter broke so he is not able to carry out his work as a mail carrier. // Gina calls Rainbow Ruby because today is the day to show their appreciation to Mayor Ling Ling. It took a long time for the village friends to prepare an amazing painting for the mayor. Unfortunately, Thunderbell accidentally destroyed the painting while delivering it.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Gina, Thunderbell, and Choco try to cheer Jessy up but their efforts are of no use. While talking to Mayor Ling Ling, Rainbow Ruby realizes that today is the day that Jessy first arrived in Rainbow Village! Jessy was upset that her friends forgot such a meaningful day to her. // Ling Ling has caught a bad cold and was sneezing all over the place. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase and transforms into a doctor and cares for him.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling is worried about the play planned for tonight. There are no costumes ready for the villagers so it's hard to figure out which roles they're playing. Rainbow Ruby transforms into a costume designer and designs costumes for her friends. // It is very windy in Rainbow village and Paige, a paper doll, is flying to wherever the wind takes her. She is so light that she is blown away by the wind. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a fire fighter and rescue Paige.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling is worried that the villagers are all in low spirits. Ruby thinks of fun games to play but the villagers say that they have already played all of the games too many times. Rainbow Ruby transforms into a singer. // Ling Ling is worried because of the "Secret Present Swapping Party" that Thunderbell is preparing. Thunderbell forgot to send out the invitations. Rainbow Ruby turns into a mail carrier and delivers the invitations.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that a Rainbow Ball Tournament is about to start soon but he is worried because the field is covered with pokey pods. Thunderbell, Ellie, and Gina are trying to pick them up and clear the field but it is not easy since the pokey pods are so spikey. // Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that he lost his glasses. Then Ellie tells her she lost her needles, Gina her hat, and Thunderbell his wheels. Who could have taken away all these things?

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling is waiting for Rainbow Ruby, looking worried. It turns out that Mr. Sloth's best friend Chirpee is depressed. Chirpee wants to fly high but is struggling due to his small wings and lack of means to learn how to fly. // Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that the dress that the paper doll Paige was planning to wear to Kiki's dance party is torn. Paige very much wants to go to the party but she cannot go without a dress.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: When Ruby and Choco arrive at the village, they find a very worried looking Ling Ling. Gina, Ellie, and Thunderbell went camping in Rainbow Forest but they saw a monster in the forest, got scared and had to run away. // Ruby is struggling to make a doll with her dad. Ruby and Choco get their suitcase and as Ruby swings her umbrella, there they are, in front of Rainbow fountain. Mayor Ling Ling tells her that today is the day of Princess Kiki's ballet performance.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby

Rainbow Ruby turns into a waitress using her magic suitcase and serve tables kindly. // Rainbow Village is full of marbles. programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Kiki wants to become a movie actress but the villagers have no idea how to direct a movie. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to turn into a movie director. She then assigns roles to the village friends. // Ling Ling rushes toward Rainbow Ruby to tell her that a busy villager mom asked him to take care of her three children but he just doesn't have time to look after them. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to transform into a babysitter and starts babysitting the children.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Blueberry ordered some Zippy Gro daisy seeds and planted them in her garden. She is surprised that they've sprouted in less than a day despite their descriptive moniker. Strawberry comes by to admire them and Blueberry is reminded that the new cookbook Strawberry ordered has arrived. Strawberry is excited to try out the new corn muffin recipe, as its level of difficulty will be a challenge for her. Strawberry follows the muffin recipe, mixes the ingredients, and double checks it.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Lemon is ecstatic. She races out of her salon and goes around to the other girls' houses proclaiming that she "did it!" and beckoning them to join her. They follow her back and are completely dazzled by her newest creation - Glamicures. They are brightly colored, jeweled manicures with tiny microchips inside that play songs when the wearer moves her hand. Each girl lines up to receive her new glamicure and soon there is a cacophony of color and sound.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake (Classic)
programme.desc: Honey Pie Pony is feeling left out of all the kids' play. She's the only one with four legs. There's no one like her to talk to and share her feelings. So Strawberry and the others take Honey Pie to Ice Cream Island - a land of horses.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Berrykins Ed and Earl report to Princess Berrykin and Strawberry that they are certain there is a monster in the berry patch! They saw something with many noses and many tails making weird noises in the bushes. But upon further investigation by Strawberry and her friends, it is discovered that friendly boy Huckleberry Pie was driving his pet-mobile of orphan dogs through the countryside, took a wrong turn and got stuck near Berry Bitty City.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake (Classic)
programme.desc: Angel Cake likes everything "just so" - and when things don't go her way, she's a pretty bad sport... until Strawberry & Apple Dumplin' help her become the berry best of sports.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake (Classic)
programme.desc: It's winter and the pond's frozen and that means Strawberry and friends can ice skate! They decide to showcase their talents at an Ice Dance Show. But just then, a new kid named Apricot shows up.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Cherry Jam is being driven to distraction! She can't finish a song that she promised to write for a singing group, thanks to the earsplitting noise from Berrykin construction crews who are trying to find the sparkleberry juice blockage that has shut down the town's power. Strawberry can't cook in the café, Lemon's hair salon appliances are running out of control-life in Berry Bitty City is impossible!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake (Classic)
programme.desc: The Berry Blossom Festival is underway and everyone in Strawberryland is having a Grand Time, thanks to the selfless efforts of Strawberry Shortcake: she's really giving this festival all she has!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: After returning to the café after a walk with her pets, Strawberry is met by Mr. Longface. He's been waiting for her so that they can get started making treats and decorating for Sadiebug's and Kadiebug's party that afternoon. But Custard and Pupcake have enjoyed their time outside so much that they want to continue playing.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Strawberry is really touched when her girlfriends and the Berrykins volunteer to help her with the construction of her new marketplace, so when the girls suggest they take charge of designing Strawberry's dream-bedroom to go on the second story, of course Strawberry agrees. While construction is going on, the girls each show Strawberry their individual ideas for the bedroom.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: With time running out before the Grand Opening celebration for the new Marketplace, Strawberry's friends get the idea to invite her favorite singer, superstar CHERRY JAM, to be the guest singer. The girls are blown away when their berryjuice cell phone gets a text message that Cherry accepts their invitation! Strawberry is touched by their surprise, but reminds them that now the town and Marketplace really have to shine!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Cherry Jam is so enjoying staying in Berry Bitty City, that she calls her managers in Big Bitty City and informs them that she is going to stay for a much needed vacation! Strawberry and the girls are thrilled that she will be with them for a little longer, and they do all they can to make their guest comfortable. But Cherry doesn't want to be treated like a guest; she wants to fit in and contribute to the community.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Berry Bitty City is holding its first city-wide talent show! Hearing that it's the music students of superstar Cherry Jam, a talent scout from Big Bitty City plans to show up. Strawberry and her friends excitedly anticipate her arrival.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Raspberry is discovered by a talent scout who wants her to move to Berry Big City and design a new line of Glitter fashions! She will be provided with her own studio, staff, publicity, commitments from big department stores-everything she needs to be a big fashion designing star! All her friends are thrilled for her. Only Cherry is a bit less enthusiastic about Raspberry's stardom, which Raspberry mistakenly interprets as jealousy.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: With the summer almost over, Blueberry overhears Strawberry talking about a wonderful tropical island and believes her friend is going to surprise them all with a much needed vacation! Blueberry makes the other girls promise to keep the secret until Strawberry reveals the big surprise. Of course, even though they've promised to keep the secret, they can't help but try and suss out what the island's like from every little thing Strawberry does.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: It's the last week of summer and Berry Bitty City is hopping with activity as the girls prepare for their tropical island vacation at Berry Breezy Bay Resort. But just as they're about to leave, bad news: the resort is closed for the season due to berry breezy weather. The girls are disappointed, but Orange isn't giving up. She says if they can't go to the tropical island, maybe they can bring the tropical island here!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: With only a few days of summer left, the girls are about to enjoy their first vacation in their newly-created, tropical beach resort at Berry Bitty Lake, when who should descend upon them but Mavis Maraschino, the comically over-the-top "Entertainment Tonight"-style show host. Mavis has dumped her focus on fashions in favor of an even glitzier show called Lifestyles of the Berry Big Bitty Stars, and she wants her first segment to be about how pop superstar Cherry Jam spends her vacation.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: J.R. Giraffe helps Josephine learn to accept herself just the way she is.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers helps out at Negri's Music Shop when Helena leaves to care for her sick son.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers meets Natasha, a famous oboeist, who expresses her feelings through music.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers introduces a week of programs about the environment.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers goes to Brockett's Bakery to decorate gingerbread men.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers talks about how important it is to take care of our teeth.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a film of an earthmover digging a hole.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a model car and uses wooden blocks to build a roadway for it.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers plants a seed and visits a conservatory.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers brings in a cat named Jimmy and remembers him as a kitten.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers says that the bean plant he planted a few days ago has grown.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers plays games that require patience.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers "colors a song" by playing music by Mozart to inspire his artwork.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Maggie Stewart stops by to invite Mister Rogers to the Sing-and-Sign at Brockett's Bakery.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop is sad because she lost her pet caterpillar, Monty. Barney and the others try to help her find it. Baby Bop is surprised to discover Monty inside a chrysalis. Everyone is excited to find Monty now a beautiful butterfly! Rachel carelessly litters in the park then later has a dream about animals who talk. With Barney and the animals help, Rachel learns that the park is home to many. Rachel realizes the importance of nature and of keeping our earth clean!

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ receives a letter from his pen pal in China revealing that his pen pal will be coming to visit. With the help of friends, BJ hurries to get the park ready. He wants it decorated so his pen pal feels right at home. BJ soon learns that his pen pal wants to see how BJ really lives. Barney has a tee-rific surprise for BJ and Baby Bop. Cousin Riff is moving to town!

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ is pretending to be a great detective and a case quickly comes his way when something nibbles on one of Baby Bops healthy snacks. BJ, Barney, and Baby Bop uncover several clues along the way and soon realize the culprit is a pet rabbit. When Riff hears a mysterious sound in the park, he plays detective. Along the way, they explore the sense of sound while identifying sounds of nature and the neighborhood.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop wants everyone to play with her instead of working in their garden. They promise to play with her as soon as they finish. Baby Bop can't wait, and tries many ways to get them to come play with her now. When her friends do come to play, they have a tea party and enjoy some of the fresh things from the garden. Riff invents a Happiness Machine to try to cheer up a sad little girl. But it's her friends, not the machine, that make her happy!

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Everyone loves Barney! When Ryan tries to be just like Barney, he has a hard time filling Barney's shoes. Ryan soon learns that he is special when he's just being himself! Barney's friends are having a hard time deciding what to do because everyone wants to do the same thing! Barney's Native American tale, The Chase, shows them that it's best to think for themselves and not follow the crowd.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Barney and Riff help Baby Bop learn how to follow the rules and learn that rules make games fun for everyone! Baby Bop is having one of those days! Every time she turns around, someone is telling her no! As her frustration grows, Barney explains that the word no can help you avoid making mistakes or getting hurt.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: There's a fishing contest in the park! When Ryan is tempted not to follow the rules, Barney tells The Emperor's Contest and Ryan discovers that honesty is the best policy. A talented young artist is painting a portrait of Barney, but when she steps away, BJ takes credit for it. When the others beg him to teach them to paint, BJ admits the truth and learns that honesty is the best policy!

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Barney is snacking on pistachios...and just can't seem to stop! His friends try to help. An unexpected avalanche of pistachios convinces Barney that his friends may be right. BJ has a dream after eating too many sweets, where he eats as many sweets as he wants and ends up with a big stomachache. When he wakes up, hes happy to find out it was only a dream. When he asks for a healthy snack, his friends are happy to oblige.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: When Baby Bop becomes a little bossy playing with her friends, Barney teaches her that being bossy isn't a nice way to treat your friends. Riff feels terrible when he accidentally wrecks BJs beloved scooter. BJ loved that scooter more than almost anything! Riff and Baby Bop decide to have a sale in the park to raise money to buy BJ a brand-new scooter.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop is having a hard time finding a story she hasn't heard before. Barney and the dinos decide to tell her an old story with a new twist...by singing Little Red Riding Hood! When a wheelchair-bound child is unintentionally neglected by his friends, Barney steps in to help. He reminds the others to include the child by showing them that even Barney feels excluded sometimes. In the end, everyone is included for a day of fun!
